name: Loving Exchange
description: Warm, affectionate conversation with compliments and intimacy

messages.content: Hey beautiful, I've been thinking about you all day.
You're honestly the best thing that's happened to me.
I love how you always know what to say.
Thank you for being so patient with me.
I feel so comfortable with you. I can tell you anything.
You make me want to be a better person.
I love you. I really do.
